label: Sinai Arabic NF M 66, Undertext (Christian Palestinian Aramaic)

bib.citation: Sauget, Joseph-Marie. Premières recherches sur l’origine et les charactéristiques des synaxaires melkites (XIe-XVIIe siècles). Subsidia Hagiographica 45. Brussels, 1969

Desreumaux, Alain. "Les manuscrits araméens christo-palestiniens du nouveau fonds du monastère de Sainte-Catherine du Sinaï." Comptes rendus des séances de l'Académie des Inscriptions et Belles-Lettres 154 (2010): 1317-1328

Müller-Kessler, Christa. “The Unknown Martyrdom of Patriklos of Caesarea in Christian Palestinian Aramaic from St Catharine’s Monastery (Sinai, Arabic NF 66).” Analecta Bollandiana 136 (2018): 63-71. https://doi.org/10.1484/J.ABOLL.4.2019024

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.
